name: Neo3dEngine
desc: A minimalist CPU-based 3D console engine in C# (.NET 8) built from scratch. Features Raycasting/Raytracing, dynamic lighting & shadows, .obj loader, and custom…
descFull: A minimalist CPU-based 3D console engine in C# (.NET 8) built from scratch. Features Raycasting/Raytracing, dynamic lighting & shadows, .obj loader, and custom TCP-based multiplayer with real-time chat. No external graphics APIs.
